CREATE TABLE test.visits (ID UInt32, CounterID UInt32, Sign UInt32, Goals Array(UInt32));

SELECT Goals.ID AS GoalID, sum(Sign) AS Reaches, sumIf(Sign, num = 1) AS Visits FROM test.visits ARRAY JOIN Goals, arrayEnumerateUniq(Goals.ID) AS num WHERE CounterID = 160656 GROUP BY GoalID ORDER BY Reaches DESC LIMIT 10;
CREATE TABLE test.nested_visits (ID UInt32, CounterID UInt32, Goals Array(UInt32), Sign Array(UInt32));
SELECT arrayEnumerateUniq(Goals, Sign) AS enumeration FROM test.nested_visits ARRAY JOIN Goals, Sign WHERE CounterID = 160656;
SELECT a.ID, arrayEnumerateUniq(b.Goals) AS GoalNum FROM (SELECT ID FROM test.visits) AS a JOIN (SELECT Goals FROM test.visits) AS b ON a.ID = b.ID;
WITH (SELECT arrayJoin(arrayEnumerateUniq(Goals)) FROM test.visits WHERE CounterID = 160656) AS nums SELECT Goals.ID AS GoalID, nums AS enumeration FROM test.visits ARRAY JOIN Goals;
